MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Second Set Of Special Interrogatories Directed To Defendants Lee And Kim, And To First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents Directed To Defendants Neo Romax, Inc., Lee, And Kim
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kristine Poplawski, Ceputy City Attorney 415-554-3800 for Plaintiff/Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Second Set Of Special Interrogatories Directed To Defendants Lee And Kim, And To First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents Directed To Defendants Neo Romax, Inc., Lee, And Kim.

The Motion to Compel Further Responses to Second Set of Special Interrogatories Directed to Defendants Lee And Kim, and to First Set of Requests for Production of Documents Directed to Defendants Neo Romax, Inc., Lee, And Kimis is GRANTED, no Opposition filed. Defendant to provide responsive, non privileged documents on or before December 1, 2017.

Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
